data.title: Trump’s tariffs will stay in place as US Supreme Court rejects expedited review
data.description:
Trump’s tariffs are not going anywhere anytime soon. On Friday, the US Supreme Court rejected a request from two toy manufacturers who tried to speed up their lawsuit challenging the legality of the trade penalties. That decision means the administration now has a full 30 days to respond, not a day less, as the normal […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trumps-tariffs-will-stay-in-place/

data.title: Crypto ETFs Near Approval as SEC Signals Pro-Crypto Shift
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, the likelihood of U.S. regulators approving a wave of crypto exchange-traded funds (ETFs) is now a near certainty, indicating a continued pro-crypto shift at the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). Bloomberg analysts Erich Balchunas and James Seyffart have raised their odds for the vast majority of crypto ETF approvals to “90% or higher,” citing “very positive” engagement from the SEC. The analysts also suggested that the SEC “likely” views cryptocurrencies such as Litecoin (LTC), Solana (SOL), XRP (XRP), and Dogecoin (DOGE) as commodities, a designation that would place them outside of its immediate jurisdiction.

The timing of approvals and the launch of spot products remains unclear, with speculation that the process could take several months and may extend beyond October. Asset managers are eager to replicate the success of spot Bitcoin (BTC) ETFs, which saw demand far exceed expectations in the first year, culminating in the most successful U.S. ETF launch of all time. BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin Trust, trading under the ticker IBIT, has been the most successful product, surpassing $70 billion in assets after recording 31 straight days of inflows. This milestone was reached in just 341 days, highlighting the strong demand for Bitcoin ETFs.

Despite Bitcoin's success, replicating this with other cryptocurrencies may prove challenging, given the lukewarm demand for Ether (ETH) ETFs since their launch last July. Although ETF inflows have improved in recent months, Glassnode reported that by May, the average ETH ETF investor remained “substantially underwater.” While demand for other crypto assets could eventually outpace Ether, altcoins are unlikely to erode Bitcoin’s dominance in the ETF market anytime soon. Investors are closely monitoring several proposals, such as Franklin Templeton’s XRP and SOL ETFs, which were recently opened for public comments by the SEC.

data.title: China Keeps Rates Unchanged As US Trade Deal Eases Growth Concerns
data.description:

The People’s Bank of China(PBOC) held the 1-year loan prime rate at 3. 0% and the 5-year LPR at 3. 5%. Last month, Chinese authorities cut the […]

data.title: Thailand SEC Opens Consultation on Exchange-Issued Tokens, July 21 Feedback Deadline
data.description:
Thailand has proposed updated listing standards that permit exchanges to list their own or affiliated tokens when used on-chain, provided issuers and related parties are fully disclosed. Exchanges would update legacy token data within 90 days, supporting market integrity and investor safeguards.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/thailand-sec-consultation-exchange-issued-tokens/

data.title: BOE Governor’s Skepticism Threatens Digital Pound Timeline Amid Global CBDC Race
data.description:
Speaking in Kyiv, Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey has questioned the need for a retail Digital Pound, citing unclear benefits, while confirming that wholesale CBDC work for financial institutions has advanced and pondering whether strict bank regulation has increased risk in non-bank sectors.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/digital-pound-timeline-risk-boe-governor-doubts-need/

data.title: SOL Set for $200 Breakout as ETF Odds Hit 91% and ‘Solana Summer’ Begins
data.description:
SOL has traded near $142 in a make-or-break range as corporate treasuries have pivoted to Solana, seven asset managers have filed spot ETF bids with 91% approval odds, and tomorrow’s “Solana Summer” launch has sharpened focus on a climb toward $200.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/sol-at-make-or-break-level-3-reasons-200-could-come-fast/
